name: Reports - Transfers Report (for Accounting Reconciliations)
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Find "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/323-reports-transfers-report-for-accounting-reconciliations#Faqs", "children": [{"text": "related articles", "bold": true}]}, {"text": " ", "bold": true}, {"text": "at the bottom of this page"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Transfers report is generally used for Accounting purposes to reconcile your accounting package In-transit account and the inventory movements with Retail Express. The report provides a total for stock dispatched and received for each day per Outlet within the selected date range, and can be expanded to show more values for each transfer."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Reconciliation via this report is performed at a detailed transaction level. For help with account or summary level reconciliation, please see "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/323-reports-transfers-report-for-accounting-reconciliations#Faqs", "children": [{"text": "related articles"}]}, {"text": "."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Considerations when using this report:"}], "data-id": "considerations-when-using-this-report"}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Outbound transfers are negative as they represent a value "}, {"text": "removed", "italic": true}, {"text": " from stock"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Inbound transfers are positive as they represent a value "}, {"text": "added", "italic": true}, {"text": " to stock"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "This report only includes the movements when transfers are dispatched and received - not created. The point of dispatch/receiving is when the inventory movement occurs within Retail Express."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "By default your stock in transit account will be adjusted by the Buy Price value as Direct Costs will already have been expensed on the supplier invoice."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "If you are using Direct Cost Provisioning your stock in transit movements will be for the COGS value with Buy Price coming from your inventory account and the Direct Costs coming from your direct cost provisioning account."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To access the Transfers Report:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to"}, {"text": " Reports > Accounting Reports > Transfers", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Update the "}, {"text": "Search Fields ", "bold": true}, {"text": "and "}, {"text": "Refine Search ", "bold": true}, {"text": "sections as required"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pperFEAQ.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pperFEAQ.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "transferreport_filters.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Search", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Results are displayed grouped by date. Click to expand and view individual transfers and amounts within each date."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphb2EAA.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphb2EAA.jpg",
